title: Memory
description: Status: draft. The packet names a Memory Card/schema (STABLE_SCHEMA_CARDS.md, ESL_BRIDGE.md) without specifying its shape. This first draft models a community/oral-memory contribution that may reference one or more observations; it should be revisited once the community-memory research question (research/research-questions.md, question 7) is explored further.

examples.title: Community recollection of the market relocation
